summary: The Docker-based reproduction clones upstream tag 11.1.0, mounts the checkout into the container, and confirms that the shipped bundle accepts forged DSA signatures on certificate, CSR, and direct Signature verification entrypoints.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should print that certAccepted, directAccepted, and csrAccepted are all true, followed by the exact proof string 'EVOHUNT_PROOF: forged DSA signatures accepted in certificate, CSR, and direct Signature verification'.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned https://github.com/kjur/jsrsasign.git at tag 11.1.0 (resolved commit 58bb24192f501927014b67911bbde8ef27532319), built the reproduction container, and printed a JSON object with certAccepted=true, directAccepted=true, and csrAccepted=true, followed by the expected EVOHUNT proof string.
verification_method: The host run script builds the container and runs /app/verify.sh. verify.sh invokes verify.js against the mounted /target-repo checkout, prints the observed booleans, and then grep-checks the exact proof string so the run fails closed if the forged artifacts are not accepted.
evidence_produced_by_run: EVOHUNT_PROOF: forged DSA signatures accepted in certificate, CSR, and direct Signature verification
The reproduction verified that tag 11.1.0 resolved to commit 58bb24192f501927014b67911bbde8ef27532319 before running the proof.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host at tag 11.1.0, verifies the resolved commit is 58bb24192f501927014b67911bbde8ef27532319, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
